name: Tante's Booze Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly grease and flour a 10-inch spring form pan.
2. Mix all the ingredients together in a mixer until well blended.
3. Pour into the pan and bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for about 50 minutes.
4. Let cool on a rack for 25 minutes before removing from the pan.
NOTE: This makes a great adult Halloween cake. Frost with orange cream cheese frosting and decorate like a jack-o-lantern. And it is EASY!
